pixi.min.mjs
version: 8.19.0 (PixiJS v8, single-file ESM browser build)
source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pixi.js@8/dist/pixi.min.mjs
license: MIT (https://github.com/pixijs/pixijs/blob/dev/LICENSE)
downloaded: 2026-06-11 (PIXI-RENDER-001)
api notes (확정):
- new Application(); await app.init({ width, height, preference:'webgl', background, autoStart:false, antialias })
- new MeshSimple({ texture, vertices:Float32Array, uvs:Float32Array, indices:Uint32Array })
- 수동 정점 갱신: mesh.autoUpdate=false; mesh.vertices 변이 후 mesh.geometry.getBuffer('aPosition').update()
- app.renderer.extract.pixels({ target, frame, resolution }) → { pixels:Uint8Array(RGBA), width, height }
